rule Windows_Trojan_Amadey_7abb059b

	meta:

		creation_date = "2021-06-28"
		last_modified = "2021-08-23"

		severity = 100
		arch_context = "x86, arm64"

		license = "Elastic License v2"

	strings:

	condition:

}
